description: A World subclass that provides helpers for interacting with the rule builder

1.0.description:
V1.0 Version of the Look Outside Archipelago AP World and client.

Locations include

- All door encounters
- All recruits
- All overworld items and loose cockroaches
- (Most) event gifts and cash drops
- All combat victories

Options:

- Death link
- Randomize the amount of arms the player has
- Set rat baby's name
- Set completion goal
   - Flawed ritual
   - Perfect ritual
   - Screaming Skies
   - Promise
   - Mask
   - Xin-amon
   - Unity
   - True-final
   - All endings that take place on the roof
   - All endings
- Small selection of toggleable location groups
- Ability to toggle on/off the ability to rob overworld shopkeepers (Mutt and Eugene)
1.0.title: 1.0 Alpha

1.1.description:
## New Locations
- Defeating the floating corpse near Tickle that comes to life and attacks the player now grants a location check
- The stationery item in the mailroom’s office now grants a location check. Its vanilla drop has been removed.
- Morton’s vanilla drops are replaced with location checks; Morton has been adjusted to only give rewards for up to 21 junk given. 
- The Chobham Armor granted by the SWAT van when Audrey is in the party now grants a location check. Its vanilla drop has been removed.
- The trash can and cockroach in the ground floor corner store now grant location checks. Their vanilla drops have been removed.
- The items in the floor 2 janitor’s closet now grant location checks. Their vanilla drops have been removed.
- The Hadal Trident in the Abyssal garbage room of the flooded apartment now grants a location check. Its Vanilla drop has been removed
## Bugs Affecting Preexisting Locations
- The fork on the table of Dan’s apartment no longer gives the vanilla drop and now sends the appropriate location check
- The location check for killing Dan’s mom is now awarded after the battle instead of before
- The duct tape in the mailroom Saturn disc storage room no longer gives the vanilla drop and now sends the appropriate location check
- Audrey’s looting the cop car’s remains now sends the appropriate location check
- Fixed logic error where “basement key” was not classified as required for Dan’s quest
- Various missing meat world locations have been updated
- Fixed bug where the game would not send ‘goal completed’ to the server if the player’s chosen goal was “Screaming Skies”
- Fixed bug where the game would not send ‘goal completed’ to the server if the player’s chosen goal was “All Endings”
- Removed vanilla item drop from killing Wilhelmina in the Crossword Dungeon
- The Biting Boots item to the west of Joel in teeth hell now no longer has its vanilla item image and drop. Location is now always granted when picking it up.
- Screaming pizza slices are no longer granted to the player upon defeating the mad pie
- Antenniform legs are no longer granted by Darryl when the player closes their eyes during his battle
- The secret cache in the landlord’s dining room now gives correct location name
- The items in Mutt’s shop which weren’t displaying the correct location name have been fixed
- The second drawer in the landlord apartment’s east wing now displays the appropriate location name (previously it displayed the name for the drawer next to it)
- The Sapper encounter now grants the location instead of immediately booting players to the attack option
- The Scout in the landlord’s dining room no longer gives the vanilla radio drop
- Cockroaches no longer give their vanilla drop on top of their location when picked up while in an aggro state
- Picking up the painting from Frederick’s apartment now displays the appropriate location message, no longer performs the canvas carry bag -> painting item exchange from vanilla
    - Player is now blocked from attempting to pick up the incorrect painting
- An item in the floor 2 hallways that appears after the grinning beast has been defeated on Cursed mode has been adjusted to appear in all difficulties
- An item in the rat apartment that only appears on Survivor mode has been adjusted to appear in all difficulties
- The spore guardian Audrey loot location check has been fixed, both in the case where you defeat it with Audrey in the party and when you return with her later
- Buying the item in the reptile football slot of Eugene’s shop now sends the appropriate location check
- Defeating the rat freak in combat now sends the appropriate location check
- Fixed bug where the manuscript completion location was rewarded when interacting with the typewriter in the Typewrither’s apartment whether or not the player had the loose manuscript item in their inventory
- The cheese items behind the guardian rat no longer give their vanilla drops on top of their locations checks. All four cheese items now appear on all difficulties.
- Spine's gift now sends the appropriate location, and no longer grants the vanilla Spine Dagger drop.
- The item dropped by Summer in the flooded apartment no longer grants the vanilla item drop.
- The Jellyfish and Dragonfish combo fight in the abyssal section of the flooded apartment now grants the appropriate location
- Learning yoga from Swordmaster Comatus now grants the appropriate location
## Item Grant Bugs
- The game no longer reverts player’s arms granted back to 0 if they start a new save file while already connected to archipelago
- The Spine Dagger item drop gives the player Spine Dagger or Ethereal Dagger depending on whether they’re currently in meat world, mirroring the in-game behavior of the item.
- Fixed a bug where redundant “Player’s Arm” items would still appear in the item pool when the player picked the yaml option to start with them
- Tame landmine now starts out dealing 60hp of damage instead of 0, to reflect in-game behavior
    - Tame landmine damage is now no longer reset when getting the 12 defused mine prize location from the Minesweeper
## Rebalancing
- The “Junk Pile” item now grants the player 3 junk instead of 5. The number of them in the pool has been adjusted to reflect this
- The “Five Hundred dollars” item has been changed to a “Two Hundred and Fifty Dollars” item. The number of them in the pool has been changed to reflect this.
- Combat victories no longer reward their vanilla cash drops
- New filler item pack types have been added to the pool
- New trap types have been added to the pool
- Expanded the number of armors and weapons that are classified as “unique” (only appear in the item pool once)
- The player can no longer enter the room locked by the Small Red Key to get the Unity ending while Sybil is alive
- Fridges no longer have a chance to attack the player on difficulty levels other than Cursed, to better match vanilla game behavior
- The calendar event in the player’s bedroom no longer tiggers the new day event when changing days; Monty will not craft brews or paintballs, Sophie will not find marbles, Tumor Lumps will not duplicate, and any quests or statuses that ordinarily progress overnight will not be affected when jumping days forward or backwards on the calendar
## Quality of Life Changes
- Combat victories, rescuing sewer kids, recruiting characters, and playing video games now trigger a message notifying the player what item was at that location. Items acquired from other games in the multiword are still silently added to the player’s inventory
- The player now has the option to enter the meat world version of apartment 35 from the front door after giving Sybil the telescope, instead of needing to attack her first
- Changed some location names to make the requirements more clear
- The flawed offering painting has had its name changed to “Incorrect Painting” so the player can better differentiate it from the correct painting offering
- New event in the 3rd floor stairwell shows the player their chosen goal and their progress towards it
- The first time connecting to archipelago on a save file will now always properly set item names for items awarded during combat
- Connecting to archipelago on the title screen will now not attempt to send location checks from the most recently loaded save file, if the player has opened a different save file since booting up the game
- Events will now display the correct location names if the player slot has changed since loading the save file
- Death link now sends a message on activation
- Location hints are now awarded when the player first sees the shop inventory of: The 3rd floor vending machine, Audrey, The Rat Hole, Kevin, Emmanuel, and Tickle.
- Added ability to revert Wilhelmina’s death from the calendar in the player’s bedroom if they haven’t gotten the words of power ending and their goal is “all endings”
- Added ability to bring Spine back to life from the calendar in the player’s bedroom
- Added ability to bring Ben back to life from the calendar in the player’s bedroom
- Resetting the offerings from the calendar in the player’s bedroom will now also reset the states of the astronomers on the roof if they have already verified their offerings, and also reverses the player’s state if their head had started splitting open in the leadup to the failed ritual ending
1.1.title: 1.1 Alpha

1.1.1.description: Patch to fix a bug where `ShopHelpers` functions were causing the game to crash on boot.
1.1.1.title: 1.1.1 - Bug Fix

1.1.2.description:
- Fixes bug that caused the apworld to generate enough filler items to fill all slots in the multiworld instead of matching the items generated to the current world's unfilled location count
- Fixes bugs with how item generation handles precollected items
1.1.2.title: 1.1.2 - Apworld patches

1.2.description:
# QOL Changes
- New feature: Look Outside items (or items from other games with identical names to Look Outside items) now have the appropriate icons in the overworld
- Door encounters no longer appear randomly; player will never see a door encounter that they did not summon on purpose.
- Updated messages for the “ease regrets” functionality in the calendar event in the player’s bedroom. Existing messages have been proofread.
- Table items in Eugene's shop now display custom archipelago sprites instead of their vanilla sprites (note, item names in Eugene's shop still do not display the appropriate item category colors)
- Table items in Mutt's shop now all display archipelago game cartridge sprites instead of their vanilla sprites
- New YAML Options:
    - **Hide Overworld Items**: all items will show up with the default archipelago game cartridge icon, with no confirmation dialogue to pick them up. The player won’t know what the item is until they already have taken it.
    - **Include Traps**: Toggles whether or not traps appear in the item pool
    - **Include Superbosses**: Toggles whether or not superbosses have randomized rewards
        - Locations considered superboss locations are: Honko, Baby Teeth Day 9, Swordmaster Comatus, KOTD, Slime Hydra, Drowning, Mutt, Boiler Beast, Furnace, as well as any overworld item locked behind defeating any of the bosses listed.
- Added default true toggles for some location categories
- Added more filler items to the pool that are multiples of useful items
- Added missing Massacre Princess weapon "Sword of Regicide" to the item pool

# Client Bug Fixes
- Fixed bug where game would attempt to update player items and location information before save file was fully loaded
- Fixed bug where game wouldn’t get items or send locations for a save file upon load if player was already connected to the AP server before loading the save file
- Fixed crash that hit when player entered the hidden room under the stairs
- Fixed bugs where location name would not be announced by dialogue box in the following situations
    - Sparing Spine
    - Defeating Scissors in the Taxidermy apartment
    - Defeating Limbs in the flesh world Taxidermy apartment
    - Defeating Tail Rat in the rat infested apartment
    - Defeating Louis’ Tail in Vincent’s apartment
    - Defeating Beryl in the basement garage
    - Playing the video game Octocook
    - Playing the video game Catafalque
    - Enforcing boundaries with the Masked Shadow
    - Slaying the Faceless Husk in Meat World Sybil
    - Killing Hellen’s fruit
    - Recruiting the Spider
- Fixed bugs where the location check would not be rewarded in the following cases
    - Killing Aster
    - Killing the Kind Faced Man (Jacob)
    - Killing Harriet
    - Picking up Junk #1 in Steve’s basement storage room
    - Killing Tickle/Removing Tickle from his pipe
    - Killing the rat swarm at the entrance to rat hell
    - Killing ***** (the slime) in glitch world
    - Picking up the item in the magazines / dirty magazines location in the rat infested apartment
- Fixed regression related to the 1.1 update’s ethereal/spine dagger item where the item wouldn’t be awarded at all
- Pulling the sewer lever no longer lowers the sewer grates like in vanilla. Now the only way to lower them is to get the “Sewer Grates Lowered” item
- Location for receiving the clown drawing from Pierre is now awarded after the dialogue finishes instead of at dialogue start.
- Fixed bug where player’s “under the stairs” state would not be properly reset when entering the secret door or teleporting home from under the stairwell, leading them to be unable to walk down the stairs at the bottom of the stairwell upon returning from upstairs.
- Fixed bug where the location reward notification for defeating the grinning beast would interrupt the transition out of the grinning beast chase sequence.
- Fixed bug where location for defeating Predator in meat world would be awarded when enemy entered an aggro state instead of upon combat victory
- Items in Mutt's shop have been excluded from the function that re-applies overrides on event refresh in attempt to ease reported issues with game lag

## Location updates
- The armor items on the bottom tables of Eugene's shop are now all randomized instead of just Reptile Football.
- Fixed issue where a bandage item in the Apartment 12 walls was not randomized
- Friendly fire locations for killing the boiler room crew have been disabled (the fights are currently bugged and cause crashes in vanilla. Locations will be re-added when the bugs are fixed officially)
- Friendly fire location for killing Morton has been disabled (the door encounter is currently bugged and it is impossible to attack him in vanilla. Location will be re-added when the bug is fixed officially)
- Killing (some of) Maurice is now considered friendly fire, and will not be randomized if the player opts to disable friendly fire in their options.
- Various locations have been renamed
    - “Apt. 33 Bedroom - Set Boundaries With Masked Shadow” has been renamed to “Apt. 33 Bedroom - Greet Masked Shadow” to reflect that the location is granted whether or not the player embraces it
    - "Apt. 12 Bathroom - Slay Spider Husk" has been renamed to "Apt. 12 Bathroom - Help the Spider Husk" and is no longer considered a friendly fire location. The location is now rewarded both when player helps the spider husk achieve independence and when they kill the spider husk.
    - Tick combat victory locations in the sewers have been renamed to reflect the specific type of tick encountered
    - Other various name adjustments for accuracy

## Logic updates
- Fixed logic bug where none of the mask ritual astronomer bosses had their specific weird offerings as a requirement in logic
- Fixed logic bug where killing Harriet was considered something you could do at the door when it is only possible inside Apartment 22
- Items, events, and enemies locked behind bars in the sewer now require “Sewer Grates Lowered” in logic
- Changed “Sophie” and “Junk Pile” to no longer be classified as progression when the player opts not to randomize door encounter rewards in their YAML options
- Finding the buried item in the Landlord battlefield now has “Player’s Right Arm” as a requirement in logic (to guarantee that they have the arm to hold the metal detector with)
- More items are now categorized as unique
- Killing the Butcher at the door is once again categorized as “Friendly Fire”

## Difficulty bugs
- Fixed errors where the following overworld item locations would not appear on cursed mode:
    - Basement Storage - Item on Counter 2
    - Sewer SW - Item Near Tick 2
    - Boiler Room North - Item on Counter 1
1.2.title: 1.2 Alpha

1.2.1.description: - Patch to fix traps still being created with the trap yaml option disabled.
1.2.1.title: 1.2.1 Trap Option Fix
